title: Future Wars Program
description: The Future Wars Program is dedicated to understanding and preparing for the character of future conflict.
text:
Ensuring battlefield superiority against tomorrow's adversaries by questioning today's assumptions
The Future Wars Program is dedicated to understanding and preparing for the character of future conflict.
It serves as the Army's intellectual vanguard, exploring how wars will be fought, what capabilities will be required, and how operational concepts must evolve to ensure battlefield dominance against peer and near-peer adversaries. It extends and challenges current and evolving assumptions and beliefs within the Army about how they plan to operate.
